changes: Added global 50% visual scale for modules; module contents scale with the module via transform.
Added compact packer that positions modules by scaled visual size to avoid overlap.
Merged attached DBT, disability/disorder, Onyx service voice, messenger plugin, profile CSS, and two-user rewards/store files into the project.
Regenerated local JSON bundle with recursive knowledge paths so static pages work through fetch fallback.
Merged two-user reward tasks and storeRewards into active dino/squishy task and store JSONs.
Added daily/weekly/monthly calendar respawn examples and schedule fallback items.
Regenerated Onyx service voice bundle with expanded service voice role catalogs.
